title: Intensely Crispy Tunisian Cauliflower Sushi
description: A crispy and flavorful Tunisian dish featuring cauliflower, shaped like nigiri sushi, perfect for a weeknight dinner, and kosher-friendly.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 425 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together the flour, cornstarch, paprika, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
Add the cauliflower florets to the bowl and toss to coat evenly with the flour mixture.
Drizzle the olive oil over the cauliflower and toss again to coat.
Spread the cauliflower out in a single layer on a baking sheet and roast in the oven for 20 minutes.
Remove the cauliflower from the oven and let it cool slightly.
Using your hands, shape the cauliflower into small nigiri-shaped pieces.
Drizzle the lemon juice and harissa over the cauliflower sushi and serve immediately.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley or cilantro, if desired.
